wrf_psfc_definition: PSFC = p8w(kts) = w1*ptot[0]+w2*ptot[1], w1=(z0-z2)/(z1-z2), z from total geopotential faces (module_surface_driver.F:1988; module_big_step_utilities_em.F:4917-4922; start_em.F:2526-2531)
verdict: FIXED: bias 328->-29 Pa, rmse 328->29.5 Pa, inside 120 Pa tol. Residual 29 Pa = output-time P/PH vs internal p_phy/p8w, not a formula error.
